scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env file is missing and throwIfMissing=true (default)
scenarios.precondition: directory set to non-existent path, default throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.expectedResult: DotenvException is thrown indicating missing file
pseudocode: TEST TC06 load throws on missing file

scenarios.description: entries(filter) returns only file-defined entries when filter is non-null
scenarios.precondition: parser.parse() returns two entries via real DotenvParser on a test .env file
scenarios.expectedResult: entries(filter) returns exactly the two file entries, excluding system env
pseudocode: TEST TC07 entries(filter) returns only file entries
// Prepare a test .env file in temp directory with KEY_A=VAL_A,KEY_B=VAL_B

scenarios.description: get(key) returns environment variable over file value when system env contains same key
scenarios.precondition: parser.parse() returns one entry (X=fromFile), real System.getenv("X") is set to fromEnv
scenarios.expectedResult: get("X") returns the system environment value, not the file value
pseudocode: TEST TC08 get returns system env override
// ensure real env var X exists with value fromEnv

scenarios.description: get(key, defaultValue) returns defaultValue when neither system nor file entry exists
scenarios.precondition: parser.parse() returns empty list, system env has no variable Z
pseudocode: TEST TC09 get with default when missing
// ensure .env is absent so parse yields empty
